Automate trades — keep control of your strategy

Our crypto and forex bots can execute for you while you shape the rules: change parameters, risk, and logic so automation matches how you actually trade.

  • Hands-off execution when you want it
  • Customize strategy settings to your style
  • Bundler for multi-wallet workflows and token launches

FX

AltGuru Bots

Two execution-focused bots plus a separate bundler tool — each built for traders who want power without giving up configurability.

₿

Crypto trading bot

Automate order flow on your connected crypto setup. Adjust strategy inputs—risk, sizing, filters, and behavior—so the bot follows rules you define, not a black box.

Forex trading bot

Run disciplined, rules-based execution on forex. Customize the strategy to your sessions, pairs, and risk tolerance while the bot handles the repetitive work.

Bundler

Wallets & token launches

A utility-focused tool to generate multiple wallets and streamline token launch workflows from one place. Built for operators who need scale and repeatability — not a substitute for due diligence.

How it works

From first setup to live automation — the same straightforward flow whether you trade crypto, forex, or use the Bundler.

  1. 1

    Choose your tool

    Pick the crypto bot, forex bot, or Bundler depending on what you want to automate or launch.

  2. 2

    Connect & set up

    Link your exchange, broker, or workflow so the software can work with your real environment.

  3. 3

    Customize your strategy

    Tune risk, sizing, filters, and logic for trading bots — or configure bundling and launch steps so everything matches your plan.

  4. 4

    Go live & refine

    Run automation, watch results, and adjust parameters over time without losing control.

Join the future of trading today.

Serious execution without giving up your edge

AltGuru bots pair with the same ecosystem you already know: clear trade logic, room to tune parameters, and automation that runs the repetitive work while you stay accountable for risk and outcomes.

Use crypto and forex bots to act on ideas faster, keep sizing consistent, and iterate your strategy over time — alongside signals, community support, and the Bundler when you need wallet and launch tooling in one stack.

Ready to run bots your way?

Pair automation with signals, or use the bundler for your launch stack — start from pricing or reach out on Telegram for setup questions.

View pricing

Frequently Asked Questions

No. You can run bots with your own rules and risk settings. Many members pair them with signals for faster execution, but it is not required.

Yes. You adjust risk, sizing, filters, and behavior so automation follows logic you define — not a single preset you cannot change.

The crypto and forex bots focus on trade execution and automation. The Bundler is a separate tool for generating multiple wallets and streamlining token launch workflows — not for placing market trades.

After you subscribe, onboarding walks you through linking the accounts or APIs your setup supports. Exact steps depend on your venue — follow the secure setup in your member area or Telegram.

Use Pricing to choose a plan, then Join to complete access. You can also reach out on Telegram if you need help choosing crypto vs forex vs Bundler.

Disclaimer

Trading decisions are yours alone. AltGuru Signals is not liable for any loss or harm arising from how you use or ignore anything we publish—on this site, in Telegram, or elsewhere. By using our materials, you agree you do so at your own risk.

Nothing we share is personalized financial or investment advice. Our trade ideas and calls are commentary and education: we document how we approach the market and share that process for learning. We will never ask to manage your funds, hold custody of your assets, or trade on your behalf.
